title: Tama and the Alliance Shift the Battle
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Law, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Beast Pirates, Sasaki as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hey!! You'll bastards! Let me go!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We're not your average foot soldiers!!

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: We're Gifters, We were given abilities!

dialogue.speaker: Sasaki
dialogue.text: The triceratops is charging at me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: DAMN! These shrimps are surprisingly strong!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Perfect timing!! Get these pests off...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are so many of them after you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Things keep going from bad to worse!!

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: That's it gifters, keep it up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is what happens when you face superior numbers.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Every battle on the island will end up like this!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's why I'm here! To even the odds!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: How is this... wait! I gotta move!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 33 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
